# Epoxy Custom Coatings

> Family-owned epoxy flooring contractor on Vancouver Island, British Columbia, Canada.
> Tagline: Keep your feet on better ground.

## Business Summary

Epoxy Custom Coatings installs premium epoxy, polyaspartic, and decorative concrete floor coatings for residential, commercial, and industrial clients across Vancouver Island. The company is family-owned and operated by a father-and-son-in-law team with 30 years of flooring industry experience.

## Contact

- Phone: (778) 700-1095
- Email: info@epoxycustomcoatings.com
- Address: 2626 Sunderland Rd, Victoria, BC, Canada
- Website: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com

## Service Area

Victoria, Langford, Saanich, Nanaimo, Duncan, and communities across Vancouver Island, British Columbia.

## Services

- Residential epoxy floor coatings (garages, basements, workshops, mudrooms, home gyms)
- Outdoor surface coatings (patios, driveways, pool surrounds, outdoor kitchens)
- Commercial and industrial floor coatings (restaurants, retail, warehouses, manufacturing, auto shops, healthcare)
- ESD and static-control coatings (labs, data centers, medical facilities, electronics manufacturing)
- Coating systems: epoxy, PMMA, polyurethane, metallic epoxy, flake systems, microcement, decorative lime, stucco, ESD coatings

## Key Pages

- Home: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/
- Services: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/services.html
- Projects & Reviews: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/projects.html
- Contact: https://epoxycustomcoatings.com/contact.html

## Differentiators

- 30 years of flooring experience
- 5-star Google rating
- Family-owned Vancouver Island business
- Premium materials from Plasti-Chemie North America (MMA, PMMA, polyaspartic, epoxy, and PU resins), Arturo, Sherwin-Williams Pro+, and EcoPoxy Pro
- Free estimates available
